stemHtml: Most high-bypass (unmixed) turbofan engines are equipped with a cold exhaust reverser (fan reverser) only in order to…

options.a: prevent extra fuel consumption due to operation of the hot exhaust reverser (turbine reverser).
options.b: prevent disturbance of cold exhaust reversed airflow by the hot exhaust reversed gas flow.
options.c: reduce the risk of exhaust gas re-ingestion.
options.d: save costs and mass at the expense of a reduction in available reverse thrust.
